en.value:
1. Consolidate existing  VSBKs, increase capacity to master VSBK industries for existing and new comers, promote VSBK Technology, perfrom Technology and Environment Monitoring,
2. Promote CESEF mainstream technologies in focus areas and increase capacity for the technology production and application,establish joint ventures with real estate developers, establish alliances for CESEF Technology sustainability, promote energy reduction at incremental housing sector through CESEF household level building materials
3. Consolidate the demonstrated the win win approaches brought by the introduction of CCC ( Brick industry specific), Negotiate and convince EPs to invest on basic facilities[1], Provide backstopping and coaching to field workers, Workers empowerment through self determination, Dissemination of lessons learned in the techno-social integration area
 4.Establish Regional construction related climate change platform 
Cooperate with active regional partners
Coordination of a Techno-social exchange platform for cleaner construction technologies 
Support to GoN / MoEST
 
5. Develop options for commercialization of project services

Implement out-house financed clean technology projects
Assess the possibilities for a commercial VSBK best practice production unit
 
Capacity building Internal

 



[1] Clean drinking water, sanitation and separate living shelters

en.full: Vertical Shaft Brick Kiln Project Phase 5
